# Project Files

This folder contains project-level documentation that supports the EU AI Act Toolkit.

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| credentials.md | Maintainer credentials and external verification links |
| governance.md | Project governance and decision principles |
| license-notes.md | Practical notes about the MIT license and no-warranty position |
| maintainers.md | Maintainer and contributor information |
| roadmap.md | Project roadmap |

These files are separated from the repository root to keep the main GitHub landing page clean and easy to scan.
